2603.22279.title: 3D-Layout-R1: Structured Reasoning for Language-Instructed Spatial Editing
2603.22279.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown impressive reasoning abilities, yet they struggle with spatial understanding and layout consistency when performing fine-grained visual editing. We introduce a Structured Reasoning framework that performs text-conditioned spatial layout editing via scene-graph reasoning. Given an input scene graph and a natural-language instruction, the model reasons over the graph to generate an updated scene graph that satisfies the text condition while maintaining spatial coherence. By explicitly guiding the reasoning process through structured relational representations, our approach improves both interpretability and control over spatial relationships. We evaluate our method on a new text-guided layout editing benchmark encompassing sorting, spatial alignment, and room-editing tasks. Our training paradigm yields an average 15% improvement in IoU and 25% reduction in center-distance error compared to Chain of Thought Fine-tuning (CoT-SFT) and vanilla GRPO baselines. Compared to SOTA zero-shot LLMs, our best models achieve up to 20% higher mIoU, demonstrating markedly improved spatial precision.
2603.22279.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）和視覺語言模型（VLMs）展現了令人印象深刻的推理能力，然而在執行細緻的視覺編輯時，它們在空間理解和佈局一致性方面仍然存在困難。<lb/>我們提出了一個結構化推理框架，通過場景圖推理執行文本條件的空間佈局編輯。<lb/>給定一個輸入的場景圖和一條自然語言指令，模型在圖上進行推理，以生成一個更新的場景圖，滿足文本條件的同時保持空間一致性。<lb/>通過明確引導推理過程，利用結構化的關係表示，我們的方法提高了對空間關係的可解釋性和控制力。<lb/>我們在一個新的文本引導佈局編輯基準上評估我們的方法，該基準涵蓋了排序、空間對齊和房間編輯任務。<lb/>與思維鏈微調（CoT-SFT）和普通GRPO基準相比，我們的訓練範式在IoU上平均提高了15%，並在中心距離誤差上減少了25%。<lb/>與SOTA零-shot LLMs相比，我們的最佳模型在mIoU上提高了多達20%，顯示出顯著改善的空間精確度。
2603.22279.author: Haoyu Zhen et.al.
2603.22279.authors: Haoyu Zhen, Xiaolong Li, Yilin Zhao, Han Zhang, Sifei Liu, Kaichun Mo, Chuang Gan, Subhashree Radhakrishnan
